title: Zi Xin
content:
Zi Xin
 was a cultivator from 
Planet Suzaku
 of the 
Alliance Star System
. She was one of the four candidates for inheriting the title of "Suzaku" chosen by 
Yunque Zi
.

Appearance
[
]

She wore a light purple, cotton dress. Her eyes shined like the stars and there was faint, plum-colored lipstick applied to her elegant lips. There were several shining butterfly discs on the right side of her forehead.

History
[
]

She tricked 
Wang Lin
 into entering the Immortal Graveyard and attempted to trap him inside. Immediately, Wang Lin turned the tables on her and threw her into the void.

She was captured by 
Qian Feng
 and used as his cultivation furnace. Later, she managed to absorb 
Qian Feng
's cultivation at his death and escaped Suzaku.

She somehow ending up on Planet Five Elements. Soon after, she was chased out by the Heavenly Water Palace and reached the 
Blood Planet
 of 
Blood Ancestor
 while on the run. Subsequently, she was taken in as his concubine.

Afterwards, she went to investigate a dying planet under the Blood Ancestor's dominion. This planet was being occupied by Wang Lin's original body. She was scared off by him.

Later, Blood Ancestor harmed Wang Lin's avatar to the extent of sending it into a coma. Enraged, Wang Lin's original body attacked Blood Planet to get revenge. Zi Xin died when she tried to step in the passage inside the Blood Pavilion before Blood Planet destruction by having her body decaying and origin soul collapsing.
